Disable.description: Name a Move. For the remainder of the encounter, the target may not use that Move; the Move is considered Disabled. A target may not have more than 1 Move Disabled, if a new move is Disabled, the last Disabled Move is no longer Disabled.

Dizzy Punch.description: The target is Pushed 2-meters. Dizzy Punch Confuses the target on 17-20 during Accuracy Check.

Double Hit.description: Double Hit can hit up to 2 times. If Double Hit misses its first target, you may still use it a second time.

Double Slap.description: Double Slap can hit up to 5 times. Once the user misses, they cannot attempt to make another Double Slap attack on that turn.

Double Team.description: The user makes three copies of themselves and places them into the encounter adjacent to the user. The user must place some sign under the token of the original copy to mark it as the original. If a copy is hit by a damaging Move, it is destroyed. If the original is hit by a damaging Move, all copies are destroyed. Any copy can perform a Move but the user is still only allowed one Move per turn. All copies may shift each turn. When the user and its copies are targeted by a Move, foes must roll +2 during Accuracy Check to hit for the remainder of the encounter. When a copy disappears, the user loses 1d12 HP. Do not apply weakness or resistance to HP lost. Do not apply stats to HP lost.

Double-Edge.description: The target is pushed back 5-meters. The target takes an additional 1d12 if it is Pushed into Blocking Terrain. If the target is pushed into another Legal Target, instead, both take 1d12. After DoubleEdge deals damage, Recoil.

Echoed Voice.description: For every consecutive use of Echoed Voice, add 1d20 to its Damage Dice Roll to a maximum of 5d20. Consecutive uses of Echoed Voice can be used across different Pokpmon. If Echoed Voice is not used at least once every turn, the consecutive uses of Echoed Voice reset.

Encore.description: The target must use the same Move that it most recently used for the next 1d2+1 turns. If the Frequency of the move doesn’t allow the Move to be used so often, the target instead cannot use a Move.

Endeavor.description: The target’s HP is set to equal the user’s HP if the user’s current HP is less than the target’s current HP. If the user’s HP is equal to or greater than the target’s HP nothing happens.

Endure.description: If the user is being hit by a damaging Move, you may use Endure. If the Move would bring Endure’s user down to 0 HP or less, Endure’s user instead is set to 1 HP.

Entrainment.description: Entrainment changes one of the target’s abilities into one Ability that the user has for 1d4+1 turns.

Explosion.description: Explosion creates a 7-meter Burst. The user’s HP is set to -50% of their full HP. If the user is above Loyalty 1, their Loyalty is lowered at least 1 stage.

Extreme Speed.description: If a foe wants to declare a Move, you may instead use Extreme Speed on their turn before they can use their Move. Extreme Speed may not be Interrupted. After the user finishes the damage step of their turn, they may shift again.

Fake Out.description: You may only use Fake Out at the beginning of an encounter, as an Interrupt. Fake Out Flinches the target.

False Swipe.description: If False Swipe would lower the target to 0 HP or less, the target is instead set to 1 HP unless the target was already below 0 HP.

Façade.description: If the user is afflicted with a Status effect, use an additional 4d12 during Damage Dice Roll. If the user is afflicted with a Status effect, Façade’s Frequency drops (EOT to Battle or At-Will to EOT).

Feint.description: Feint may only Interrupt Intercepts. If used as an Interrupt, the target flips a coin, if they win the flip, they may retain the use of their Intercept for the encounter as if they did not use it during the encounter. If the target loses the flip, they use up their Intercept. Feint ignores all Intercept effects, dealing damage as if the Intercept was not used.

Flail.description: If the user has more than 70% of its total HP, use 1d10+5 for Damage Dice Roll. If the user has more than 36% of its total HP, use 2d10+10. If the user has more than 21% of its total HP, use 3d10+10. If the user has more than 6% of its total HP, use 4d10+10. If the user has 1-5% of its total HP, use 5d10+20

Flash.description: Flash creates a 4-meter Burst. Flash makes all Legal Targets need +1 to hit during Accuracy Checks.

Focus Energy.description: For the remainder of combat, the user’s Moves are Critical Hits on 17-20. If a Move already has an extended Critical Hit range, Focus energy extends that range by -3. Focus Energy’s effect cannot be used more than once per encounter unless the user somehow loses the benefit of Focus Energy.

Follow Me.description: All Foes may only target the user when using a Move until the user is knocked out or switched out. This Effect lasts for one round of combat.

Foresight.description: The user’s Normal-Type and FightingType Moves can now hit and affect Ghost-Type targets. Foresight’s user is unaffected by the effects of Moves which make them have to roll higher during Accuracy Checks to hit. Targets may not use their Speed stat to modify Accuracy Checks. Foresight’s user can identify the real target using Double Team.

Frustration.description: The user may only use Frustration if its Loyalty is level 0 or 1.

Fury Attack.description: Fury Attack can hit up to 5 times. Once the user misses, they cannot attempt to make another Fury Attack on that turn.

Fury Swipes.description: Fury Swipes can hit up to 5 times. Once the user misses, they cannot attempt to make another Fury Swipes attack on that turn.

Giga Impact.description: Giga Impact creates a 3-meter Burst around the target. On Miss, Giga Impact deals the user’s Attack instead to all possible targets.

Growl.description: Growl creates a 5-meter Burst. Growl lowers all Legal Targets Attack 1 Combat Stage.

Growth.description: Raise the user’s Attack 1 Combat Stage and raise the user’s Special Attack 1 Combat Stage. If it is Sunny, double the amount of Combat Stages gained.

Guillotine.description: The target is set to 0 HP.

Harden.description: Raise the user’s Defense 1 Combat Stage.

Head Charge.description: The target is Pushed back 5-meters. The target takes an additional 1d12 if it is Pushed into Blocking Terrain. If the target is pushed into another Legal Target, instead, both take 1d12. After Head Charge deals damage, Recoil.

Headbutt.description: Headbutt Flinches the target on 15-20 during Accuracy Check.

Heal Bell.description: Heal Bell creates a 3-meter Burst. All targets are cured of any Status ailments. Heal Bell cannot miss.

Helping Hand.description: The ally targeted with Helping Hand will have their next Move deal an additional 1d20 if the Move has a Damage Dice Roll. Helping Hand cannot miss.

Hidden Power.description: Hidden Power makes a 3-meter Burst. When a Pokpmon first obtains the Move Hidden Power, roll 1d4 and 1d20. For the 1d4 roll, a result of 1 makes Hidden Power’s Damage Dice Roll 1d12+6; a result of 2 makes the Damage Dice Roll 2d8+6; a result of 3 makes the Damage Dice Roll 2d10+8; a result of 4 makes the Damage Dice Roll 3d8+10. For the 1d20 roll, Hidden Power’s Elemental Type will be changed from Normal to Bug on a result of 1; Dark on 2; Dragon on 3; Electric on 4; Fairy on 5; Fighting on 6; Fire on 7; Flying on 8; Ghost on 9; Grass on 10; Ground on 11; Ice on 12; Normal on 13; Poison on 14; Psychic on 15; Rock on 16; Steel on 17; Water on 18; and on a result of 19-20, reroll the d20. Those become the Hidden Power’s permanent stats for that user.

Hold Back.description: If Hold Back would lower the target to 0 HP or less, the target is instead set to 1 HP unless the target was already below 0 HP.

Horn Drill.description: The target is set to 0 HP.

Howl.description: Raise the user’s Attack 1 Combat stage.

Hyper Beam.description: Hyper Beam creates a Column 1 meter wide. On Miss, Hyper Beam deals the user’s Special Attack instead to all possible targets.

Hyper Fang.description: Hyper Fang Flinches the target on 19-20 during Accuracy Check.

Hyper Voice.description: Hyper Voice creates a Column 4-meters wide. All Legal Targets are Pushed back 3-meters.

Judgment.description: Judgement makes a 5-meter Blast. Judgment’s Type can be whatever Elemental Type the user wants it to be.

Laser Focus.description: If Laser Focus’s user does not miss the next time they use a Move with a Damage Dice Roll, the Move will be a Critical Hit.

Last Resort.description: Last Resort can only be used after the user has performed 6 other different Moves.

Leer.description: The target’s Defense is lowered 1 Combat Stage.

Lock-On.description: The target is Locked-On. The next Move that the User uses against the Target that requires an Accuracy Check cannot miss. Lock-On’s effect, on both the User and Target, can be affected by Baton Pass.

Lucky Chant.description: Lucky Chant creates a 4-meter Burst. All allies in the Burst, including the user, take damage from Critical Hits as if they are not Critical Hits for 1d4+1 turns.

Me First.description: If the target declares a Move that has a Damage Dice Roll and Me First’s user has a higher Speed stat then the target, you may Interrupt with Me First. Me First will use the same Move the target was about to use on that target.

Mean Look.description: The target may not flee or be switched until it is knocked out, for the remainder of the encounter.

Mega Kick.description: The target is Pushed 6-meters. The target takes an additional 1d12 if it is Pushed into Blocking Terrain. If the target is pushed into another Legal Target, instead, both take 1d12.

Metronome.description: Metronome randomly cause the user to use any other Move. The GM helps to pick the Move at random. Some Moves may not be allowed to be randomly selected as per the GM’s discretion.

Milk Drink.description: The target regains HP equal to half of its full HP. The user may target themselves with Milk Drink.

Mimic.description: Choose a Move that the target has used during the encounter. For the remainder of the encounter, that Move replaces Mimic on the user’s Move List. Mimic cannot miss.

Mind Reader.description: The target is Locked-On. The next Move that the User uses against the Target that requires an Accuracy Check cannot miss. Mind Reader’s effect, on both the User and Target, can be affected by Baton Pass.

Minimize.description: Foes need an additional +4 during Accuracy Check to hit Minimize’s user and the user’s size is lowered one level for the remainder of the encounter (Gigantic to Huge, to Large, to Medium to Small).

Morning Sun.description: The user regains HP equal to half of its full HP. If it is Sunny, the user gains 2/3 of its full HP. If it is Rainy, Sand Storming or Hailing the user gains ó of their full HP.

Multi-Attack.description: Multi-Attack’s Type can be altered depending on what the user is holding.

Natural Gift.description: Refer to the Move Keywords Berry list. Natural Gift deals damage according to the Berry list and Natural Gift’s Type is also defined there. The user’s Berry is destroyed and is not consumed.

Nature Power.description: See Effect Nature Power uses a Move defined by Environ. If the Move’s Frequency is Battle or Center, Nature Power may not be used for the remainder of the encounter.

Noble Roar.description: Noble Roar creates a 3-meter Burst. Noble Roar lowers all Legal Targets Attack 1 Combat Stage and Special Attack 1 Combat Stage.

Odor Sleuth.description: The user’s Normal-Type and FightingType Moves can now hit and affect Ghost-Type targets. Odor Sleuth’s user is unaffected by the effects of Moves which make them have to roll higher during Accuracy Checks to hit. Targets may not use their Speed stat to modify Accuracy Checks. Odor Sleuth’s user can identify the real target using Double Team.

Pain Split.description: Add the user’s and the target’s current HP together and divide the value by 2, calling the result X. The user and target’s HP are set to X. If X exceeds a target’s or user’s full HP, the excess is ignored and they are set to full HP.

Pay Day.description: Pay Day scatters metal coins equal in value to 1d8 times the user’s level. If it is a trainer battle, the winner of the battle gets to pick up the coins.

Perish Song.description: Perish Song creates a 15-meter Burst. Perish Song cannot miss. Perish Song can affect only Pokpmon. All targets, including the user, receive a Perish Count of 3. At the beginning of each of the target’s turns, their Perish count is lowered by 1. Once a Perish Count reaches 0, set the Pokpmon’s HP to 0. A Perish Count disappears if a Pokpmon returns to their Poke Ball or is knocked out.

Play Nice.description: The target’s Attack is lowered 1 Combat Stage.

Present.description: Roll 1d4. On a result of 1, use 1d10+10 for Present’s Damage Dice Roll; on a result of 2, use 2d10+10; on a result of 3, use 3d10+10; on a result of 4 the target is healed 65 HP.

Protect.description: If the user is hit by a Move, instead you are not hit by the Move. You do not take any damage nor are you affected by any of the Move’s effects.

Psych Up.description: The user’s Combat Stages are changed to match the target’s Combat Stages. Psych Up cannot miss.

Quick Attack.description: If a foe wants to declare a Move, you may instead use Quick Attack on their turn before they can use their Move.

Rage.description: The user’s Attack is raised 1 Combat Stage as long as they used Rage on their previous turn. If the user is damaged by an attack before it’s next turn, its Attack is raised 1 Combat Stage.

Rapid Spin.description: On hit, Rapid Spin destroys Hazards within 5 meters, removes Leech Seeds, and removes the user’s Trapped status.

Razor Wind.description: Once you declare the use of Razor Wind, the user’s turn ends. On its next turn, the user may shift and use Razor Wind’s damage. Razor Wind is a Critical Hit on 18-20 during Accuracy Check.

Recover.description: The user regains HP equal to half of its full HP.

Recycle.description: The effect of a consumable item used earlier in the encounter is used again as if it had not been destroyed. The item is still gone.

Reflect Type.description: Reflect Type changes one of the user’s Types into one Type of your choice that the target has for 1d4+1 turns.

Refresh.description: The user is cured of all Status ailments.

Relic Song.description: Relic Song creates a 4-meter Burst. All Legal Targets fall Asleep on 16-20 during Accuracy Check.

Retaliate.description: Retaliate deals an additional 5d12 during Damage Dice Roll if an ally has been lowered to 0 HP or less by the target’s Moves or Features during the last 2 rounds of combat.

Return.description: The user may only use Return if its Loyalty is 3 or 4.

Revelation Dance.description: Revelation Dance creates a 5-meter Burst. Revelation Dance’s Type changes depending on the user’s primary Type.

Roar.description: The target flees away from the user 15 meters, ignoring Speed Skills, if terrain allows. The target may not use Moves for 4 rounds. During a trainer battle, the target’s owner must recall the fleeing target and replace them.

Rock Climb.description: Rock Climb Confuses the target on 1720 during Accuracy Checks.

Round.description: Round creates a 3-meter Burst. The next Pokpmon who uses Round during this round of Combat uses 20+2d10 for Round’s Damage Dice Roll. The third or any use after the third use of Round during this round of Combat uses 30+3d10 for Round’s Damage Dice Roll.

Safeguard.description: Place 10-meters of Wall. If the effect of a Move that targets through any Walls of Safeguard cause a Status Affliction, they cannot cause a Status Affliction. The Walls sustain for 5 rounds.

Scary Face.description: The target’s Speed is lowered 2 Combat Stages.

Screech.description: Screech creates a 4-meter Burst. All Legal Targets have their Defense lowered 2 Combat Stages.

Secret Power.description: Secret Power’s effect depends on Environ. Secret Power’s effect activates on 17-20 during Accuracy Check.

Self-Destruct.description: Self-Destruct creates a 4-meter Burst. The user’s HP is set to -50% of their full HP. If the user is above Loyalty 1, their Loyalty is lowered at least 1 stage.

Sharpen.description: Raise the user’s Attack 1 Combat Stage.

Shell Smash.description: Raise the user’s Attack 2 Combat Stages, raise the user’s Special Attack 2 Combat Stages and raise the user’s Speed 2 Combat Stages Lower the user’s Defense 1 Combat Stage and lower the user’s Special Defense 1 Combat Stage.

Simple Beam.description: Simple Beam changes one of the target’s abilities to Simple for the remainder of the encounter.

Sing.description: Sing creates a 4-meter Burst. All Legal Targets fall Asleep.

Sketch.description: Sketch cannot miss. Once Sketch has been used, remove Sketch from the user’s Move list. The last Move that the target used is added to the user’s Move list permanently. Sketch may not be Interrupted or Intercepted.

Skull Bash.description: Once you declare the use of Skull Bash, the user’s turn ends. On its next turn, the user may shift and use Skull Bash’s damage and effect. The target is Pushed 4-meters. The target takes an additional 1d12 if it is Pushed into Blocking Terrain. If the target is pushed into another Legal Target, instead, both take 1d12.

Slack Off.description: The user regains HP equal to half of its full HP.

Slash.description: Slash is a Critical Hit on 18-20 during Accuracy Check.

Sleep Talk.description: The user randomly uses one of their other Moves, ignoring Frequencies. Sleep Talk can only be used while the user is Asleep.

Smelling Salts.description: If the target is Paralyzed, Smelling Salts does an additional 5d10 for Damage Dice Roll and cures the target of Paralysis.

Smokescreen.description: Place 5-meters of Wall. Smokescreen’s Walls must be placed within 3-meters of the user. If anyone’s Move tries to target through a Smokescreen wall, they must roll +3 during Accuracy Check to hit. The walls remain for 5 rounds. Brick Break cannot break Smokescreen’s Walls.

Snore.description: Snore creates a 5-meter Burst. Snore Flinches all legal targets on 15-20 during Accuracy Check. Snore can only be used by a Sleeping Pokpmon.

Softboiled.description: The target regains HP equal to half of its full HP. The user may target themselves with Softboiled.

Sonic Boom.description: Sonic Boom creates a Column 1 meter wide. Sonic Boom always deals 15 points of Damage. Do not apply weakness or resistance. Do not apply stats.

Spike Cannon.description: Spike Cannon can hit up to 5 times. Once the user misses, they cannot attempt to make another Spike Cannon attack on that turn. When adding stats only add ½ Attack.

Spit Up.description: If the user is Stockpiled 1, use 3d10+12 for Spit Up’s Damage Dice Roll; if the user is Stockpiled 2, use 4d12+16; if the user is Stockpiled 3, use 5d12+18. After using Spit Up, the user’s Stockpiled count is set to 0. If the user has no Stockpiled count, Spit Up does nothing.

Spotlight.description: All Allies may only target Spotlight’s target when using a Move until Spotlight’s target is knocked out or switched out. This Effect lasts for one round of combat.

Stockpile.description: The user adds 1 to their Stockpiled count to a maximum of 3. For each number a Stockpiled count is above 0, raise the user’s Defense 1 Combat Stage and raise the user’s Special Defense 1 Combat Stage. If a Stockpiled count is set to 0, the Combat Stages gained from the Stockpiled count are removed.

Stomp.description: Stomp Flinches the target on 15-20 during Accuracy Check. If the target is Small, Stomp deals an additional 1d10.

Substitute.description: The user loses ó of their full HP. A Coat is made which has HP equal to the HP lost when using this Move +1. If the user would be hit by a Move, instead the Coat gets hit. Apply weakness, resistance and stats to the Coat.  The Coat is immune to Status Afflictions. Substitute cannot be used if the user has less than ó of their full HP. Sound Moves ignore Substitute.

Super Fang.description: The target’s HP is halved. Do not apply weakness or resistance to the HP lost. Do not apply stats to the HP lost. When halving the target’s HP with Super Fang, round up.

Supersonic.description: Supersonic creates a Column 1 meter wide. Supersonic Confuses all Legal Targets.

Swagger.description: The target’s Attack is raised 2 Combat Stages. Swagger Confuses the target.

Swallow.description: If the user is Stockpiled 1, they are healed 25% of their full HP; if the user is Stockpiled 2, they are healed half of their full HP; if the user is Stockpiled 3, they are healed back to full HP. After using Swallow, the user’s Stockpiled count is set to 0. If the user has no Stockpiled count, Swallow does nothing.

Sweet Scent.description: Sweet Scent creates a 5-meter Burst. For the remainder of the encounter, when targeting any Legal Targets that were hit by Sweet Scent, you need -2 to hit that target during Accuracy Check.

Swords Dance.description: The user’s Attack is raised 2 Combat Stages.

Tail Slap.description: Tail Slap can hit up to 5 times. Once the user misses, they cannot attempt to make another Tail Slap attack on that turn.

Tail Whip.description: The target’s Defense is lowered 1 Combat Stage.

Take Down.description: After Take Down deals damage, Recoil.

Tearful Look.description: The target’s Attack is lowered 1 Combat Stage and the target’s Special Attack is lowered 1 Combat Stage.

Techno Blast.description: Techno Blast’s Type can be any Type while holding the appropriate Drive item or Plate item.

Teeter Dance.description: Teeter Dance creates a 7-meter Burst. Teeter Dance Confuses all Legal Targets.

Thrash.description: Thrash’s user must make another Melee attack for 1d2 more turns. The attack is identical to Thrash except for Thrash’s effect. After the first target is declared, Thrash targets the nearest Legal Target for its second or third round of use if the original target is unconscious. If potential targets are an equal distance from the user, you may choose the target. After Thrash’s additional uses ends, the user becomes Confused. For Pokpmon users, the additional 1d2 are their Trainer’s Command Actions, unless the Trainer is unconscious, in which case the Pokpmon acts on its own until finished.

Tickle.description: Lower the target’s Attack 1 Combat Stage and lower the target’s Defense 1 Combat Stage.

Transform.description: The user assumes the form of the Pokpmon-target gaining its type(s) and learns all of that specific target’s Moves, gains its Abilities, copies its weight and height and Skills for the remainder of the encounter, or until the user chooses to revert to its original form, or until the user uses Transform to change into something else. The user’s Stats do not

Tri Attack.description: Tri Attack gives the target a Status ailment on 17-20 during Accuracy Check. If you rolled 17-20, roll 1d4; on 2 the target is Paralyzed; on 3 the target is Burned; on 4 the target is Frozen; on 1 reroll the die.

Trump Card.description: If the user has only used Trump Card once this encounter, use 1d10+4 for Trump Card’s Damage Dice Roll. If it is the second time the user is using Trump Card, use 1d10+4. If it is the third time the user is using Trump Card, use 1d12+6. If it is the fourth time the user is using Trump Card, use 2d10+8. If it is the fifth time the user is using Trump Card, use 7d10+28 and Trump Card’s Frequency changes to Center for the rest of the encounter.

Uproar.description: Uproar creates a 5-meter Burst that continues for 1d4+1 turns. At the beginning of the user’s turn where Uproar is continuing, they may shift then must immediately use Uproar again. Anyone in Uproar’s Burst on any turn Uproar is continuing is cured of Sleep.

Weather Ball.description: If it is Sunny, Weather Ball is FireType. If it is Rainy, Weather Ball is Water-Type. If it is Hailing, Weather Ball is Ice-Type. If it is Sandstorming, Weather Ball is Rock-Type. When a weather effect is on the field, Weather Ball’s Damage Dice Roll is 4d12+16. If there are multiple Weather Effects on the field, choose one type for Weather Ball to be that corresponds with an existing Weather Effect.

Whirlwind.description: The target is Pushed 40-meters expelling them from the encounter if the terrain allows. They may still rejoin the encounter if they want to. During a trainer battle, the target’s owner must recall the Pushed target and replace them.

Wish.description: At the end of the target’s next turn, the target regains HP equal to half of its full HP. If the user targets themselves and are replaced in battle, the replacement is healed.

Work Up.description: Raise the user’s Attack 1 Combat Stage and raise the user’s Special Attack 1 Combat Stage.

Wrap.description: Wrap Traps the target and the user for 1d4+1 turns. At the beginning of the target’s turn, if the target is Trapped, roll 1d12 and the target loses that much HP. Do not apply weakness or resistance to the HP lost. Do not apply stats to the HP lost. Wrap may not trap more than one target at a time unless the user is Huge or Gigantic.

Wring Out.description: For every 10% the target is below their full HP, Wring Out’s Damage Dice Roll is reduced by 1d12 to a minimum of 18.

Yawn.description: Yawn creates a 4-meter Burst. All targets fall Asleep at the end of their next turn. Yawn cannot miss. Poison Moves

Acid.description: Acid lowers the target’s Defense 1 Combat Stage on 18-20 during Accuracy Check.

Acid Armor.description: Raise the user’s Defense 2 Combat Stages.

Acid Spray.description: Acid Spray creates a Column 1 meter wide. Acid Spray lowers all Legal Targets’ Special Defense 2 Combat Stages.

Baneful Bunker.description: If the user is hit by a Move with a Damage Dice Roll, instead you are not hit by the Move. You do not take any damage nor are you affected by any of the Move’s effects. If the Move was Melee ranged, the attacker is Poisoned.

Belch.description: Belch can only be used if the user has eaten a Berry they were holding during the same encounter.

Clear Smog.description: The target’s Combat Stages are reset to

Coil.description: Raise the user’s Attack 1 Combat Stage and raise the user’s Defense 1 Combat Stage. For the remainder of Combat, the user needs -1 on Accuracy Checks to hit.

Cross Poison.description: Cross Poison is a Critical Hit on 18-20 during Accuracy Check. Cross Poison Poisons the target on a Critical Hit during Accuracy Check.

Gastro Acid.description: The target’s ability is disabled until the end of the encounter. If the target has more than one ability, Gastro Acid disables one of them.

Gunk Shot.description: Gunk Shot creates a 3-meter Blast. Gunk Shot Poisons all Legal Targets on 11-20 during Accuracy Check. On Miss, Gunk Shot deals the user’s Special Attack to potential targets but cannot Poison.

Poison Fang.description: Poison Fang Badly Poisons the target on 17-20 during Accuracy Check.

Poison Gas.description: Poison Gas makes a 4-meter Burst. Poison Gas Poisons all Legal Targets.

Poison Jab.description: Poison Jab Poisons the target on 15-20 during Accuracy Check.

Poison Powder.description: Poison Powder creates a 1-meter Blast. Poison Powder Poisons all Legal Targets.

Poison Sting.description: Poison Sting Poisons the target on 1720 during Accuracy Check.

Poison Tail.description: Poison Tail is a Critical Hit on 18-20 during Accuracy Check. Poison Tail Poisons the target on 19-20 during Accuracy Check.

Purify.description: If the target is Poisoned or Badly Poisoned, they are cured and then Purify’s user recovers 1/4th of its maximum HP.

Sludge.description: Sludge creates a Column 2-meters wide. Sludge poisons all Legal Targets on 1520 during Accuracy Check.

Sludge Bomb.description: Sludge Bomb creates a 3-meter Blast. Sludge Bomb poisons all Legal Targets on 15-20 during Accuracy Check.

Sludge Wave.description: Sludge Wave makes a Column 4-meters wide. Slime Wave Poisons all legal targets on 19-20 during Accuracy Check.

Smog.description: Smog creates a 3-meter Blast. Smog Poisons all Legal Targets on 13-20 during Accuracy Check.

Toxic Spikes.description: Set 10 square meters of Toxic Spikes, all 10 meters must be adjacent with at least one other space of Toxic Spikes next to each other. Toxic Spikes Poisons a foe when moving onto or over the occupied spaces with an Overland Skill. If there are 2 Layers of Toxic Spikes on the same space, it Deadly Poisons the foes instead.

Toxic Thread.description: Toxic Thread creates a Column 1meters wide. All Legal Targets within the Column lower their Speed 1 Combat Stage and are Poisoned.

Venom Drench.description: If the target is Poisoned, Venom Drench lowers the target’s Attack 1 Combat Stage, Special Attack 1 Combat Stage and Speed 1 Combat Stage.

Venoshock.description: If the target is Poisoned, Venoshock deals 5d12+22 instead during Damage Dice Roll. Psychic Moves

Agility.description: Raise the user’s Speed 2 Combat Stages.

Ally Switch.description: Choose one willing ally, shift the user’s position to the ally’s position and shift the ally’s position to the user’s position, trading places. If the ally was a target of a Move, the user is now the target. If the user was a target of a Move, the ally is now the target.

Amnesia.description: Raise the user’s Special Defense 2 Combat Stages.

Barrier.description: Raise the user’s Defense 2 Combat Stages.

Calm Mind.description: Raise the user’s Special Attack 1 Combat Stage and raise the user’s Special Defense 1 Combat Stage.

Confusion.description: Confusion Confuses the target on 19-20 during Accuracy Check.

Cosmic Power.description: Raise the user’s Defense 1 Combat Stage and raise the user’s Special Defense 1 Combat Stage.

Dream Eater.description: Dream Eater can only target someone Asleep. After the target takes damage, the user gains HP equal to half of the damage they dealt to the target.

Extrasensory.description: Extrasensory Flinches the target on 1920 during Accuracy Check.

Future Sight.description: Future Sight does nothing on the turn it is used. At the end of the second turn after Future Sight’s use, use Future Sight’s damage and effect. Future Sight creates a Column 1-meter-wide, which starts from anywhere on the field. Future Sight deals damage as if it has no Type.

Gravity.description: For 1d4+1 rounds, the area is considered Warped. While Warped, Moves that involve the user being airborne may not be used. Flying-Types and Pokpmon with the Ability Levitate are no longer immune to Ground-Type Moves. All Accuracy Checks are lowered by -2. Warped does not replace other Weather effects.

Guard Split.description: Choose between Defense and Special Defense. The target reveals the value of whichever stat you chose, and then adds it to the user’s stat of the same choice. Divide the total by two and call the result X. For the remainder of the encounter, the target and the user’s stat that you chose is X.

Guard Swap.description: The user trades all Combat Stages related to Defense and Special Defense with the target. It is okay for the user or the target to exchange Combat Stages, positive or negative, for none. Guard Swap cannot miss.

Heal Block.description: For 1d4+1 turns, the target may not gain HP by itself or be healed.

Heal Pulse.description: Heal Pulse creates a 2-meter Burst. Restores 50% of all Legal Targets max HP. Heal Pulse does not target the user.

Healing Wish.description: If the user’s HP is lowered to 0 or less, you may use Healing Wish as an Intercept. The target is treated as if it had been healed at a Pokpmon Center. Healing Wish may target a Pokpmon in a Poke Ball as long as they immediately join the encounter or are sent out. If the target knows Healing Wish or Lunar Dance, the user’s Healing Wish does not restore its Center Frequency.

Heart Stamp.description: Heart Stamp Flinches the target on 1520 during Accuracy Check.

Heart Swap.description: The targets trade their Combat Stages, both positive and negative.

Imprison.description: The target is Locked. A Locked target may not use any Moves the user knows. Each user may only make 1 target Locked at a time. Using Imprison on a new target transfers Locked to the new target. Imprison cannot miss.

Instruct.description: Choose one willing ally who just performed an At-Will or EOT Move. That ally immediately performs the Move again during the user’s Move.

Kinesis.description: Place 5-meters of Wall. If anyone’s Move tries to target through a Kinesis Wall, they must roll +3 during Accuracy Check to hit. The walls remain for 5 rounds. Brick Break cannot break Kinesis’ Walls.

Light Screen.description: The user may shift while placing Light Screen Walls if their Speed allows for the extra movement. Place 5-meters of Wall. If a foe tries to target Light Screen’s user or the user’s allies through Light Screen Walls, treat the target as if their Special Defense is raised 2 Combat Stages. This bonus cannot be awarded more than once. The

Lunar Dance.description: If the user’s HP is lowered to 0 or less, you may use Lunar Dance as an Intercept. The target is treated as if it had been healed at a Pokpmon Center. Healing Wish may target a Pokpmon in a Poke Ball as long as they immediately join the encounter or are sent out. If the target knows Healing Wish or Lunar Dance, the user’s Lunar Dance does not restore its Center Frequency.

Luster Purge.description: Luster Purge creates a Column 1-meterwide, Luster Purge creates a 5-meter Blast. Luster Purge lowers all Legal Targets Special Defense 1 Combat Stage on 11-20 during Accuracy Check.

Magic Coat.description: If the user is about to get a hit by a Move that does not have a Damage Dice Roll, they may use Magic Coat as an Intercept. The Intercepted Move’s user is treated as if they were the target of their own Move.

Magic Room.description: For 1d4+1 rounds, the area is considered Useless. While Useless, Pokpmon may not use the effects of any Held items or activate any Held items. Useless does not replace other Weather effects.

Meditate.description: Raise the user’s Attack 1 Combat Stage.

Miracle Eye.description: The user’s Psychic-Type Moves can now hit and affect Dark-Type targets. Miracle Eye’s user is unaffected by the effects of Moves which make them have to roll higher during Accuracy Checks to hit. Targets may not use their Speed stat to modify Accuracy Checks. Miracle Eye’s user can identify the real target using Double Team.

Mirror Coat.description: If the user is being hit by a Move that consults Special Attack for damage, you may use Mirror Coat. If the user survives the hit, the target is dealt damage equal to twice the amount of damage the user received. Do not apply weakness, resistance or immunity. Do not apply stats.

Mist Ball.description: Mist Ball creates a Column 1-meterwide and creates a 5-meter Blast. Mist Ball lowers all Legal Targets Special Attack 1 Combat Stage on 6-20 during Accuracy Check.

Photon Geyser.description: Photon Geyser creates a Column 1meter-wide. When calculating damage, the user can use either its Attack against all targets’ Defense, or its Special Attack against all targets’ Special Defense.

Power Split.description: Choose between Attack and Special Attack. The target reveals the value of whichever stat you chose, and then adds it to the user’s stat of the same choice. Divide the total by two and call the result X. For the remainder of the encounter, the target and the user’s stat that you chose is X.

Power Swap.description: The user trades all Combat Stages related to Attack and Special Attack with the target. It is okay for the user or the target to exchange Combat Stages, positive or negative, for none. Power Swap cannot miss.

Power Trick.description: The user’s Attack stat and Defense stat are switched for 1+1d8 rounds.

Prismatic Laser.description: Prismatic Laser creates a Column 1 meter wide. On Miss, Prismatic Laser deals the user’s Special Attack instead to all possible targets.

Psybeam.description: Psybeam creates a Column 1 meter wide. Psybeam Confuses all Legal Targets on 19-20 during Accuracy Check.

Psychic.description: The target is Pushed 5-meters in any direction. Psychic lowers the target’s Special Defense 1 Combat Stage on 1720 during Accuracy Check.

Psychic Terrain.description: For 5 rounds, the area is considered Tricky. While Tricky, Psychic Moves with Damage Dice Rolls deal an additional 2 STAB and Pokpmon on the ground may not be Interrupted.

Psycho Boost.description: Psycho Boost creates a 4-meter Blast. Lower the user’s Special Attack 2 Combat Stages after damage.

Psycho Cut.description: Psycho Cut is a Critical Hit on 18-20 during Accuracy Check.

Psycho Shift.description: The user is cured of a Status ailment and the target is given that Status ailment. Psycho Shift cannot miss. Psycho Shift can only be used if the user has a Status ailment and the target does not have the status ailment that is being transferred.

Psyshock.description: When calculating damage, the target must use their Defense against

Psystrike.description: When calculating damage, the target must use their Defense against

Psywave.description: Psywave creates a Column 2-meters wide. Roll 1d4; on 1 and 2 all Legal Targets lose HP equal to half the user’s level; on 3, all Legal Targets lose HP equal to the user’s level; on 4 all Legal Targets lose HP equal to 1.5x the user’s level. Do not apply weakness, resistance or immunity. Do not apply stats.

Reflect.description: The user may shift while placing Reflect Walls if their Speed allows for the extra movement. Place 5-meters of Wall. If a foe tries to target Reflect’s user or the user’s allies within two meters of a Reflect Wall, treat the target as if their Defense is raised 2 Combat Stages. This bonus cannot be awarded more than once. The walls remain for

Rest.description: The user’s HP is set to their full HP. The user is cured of any Status ailments. Then, the user falls Asleep. The user cannot make Sleep Checks at the beginning of their turn. They are cured of the Sleep at the end of their turn, in 2 rounds.

Role Play.description: Add one of the target’s Abilities to the user’s Abilities for 1+1d8 rounds. Role Play cannot miss.

Skill Swap.description: The user loses their Abilities and gains the target’s Abilities for the remainder of encounter. The target loses their Abilities and gains the user’s Abilities for the remainder of the encounter.

Speed Swap.description: The user trades all Combat Stages related to Speed with the target. It is okay for the user or the target to exchange Combat Stages, positive or negative, for none. Speed Swap cannot miss.

Stored Power.description: For every Combat Stage the user is above 0, per stat, add 1d10 to Stored Power’s Damage Dice Roll.

Synchronoise.description: Synchronoise creates a 6-meter Burst. Synchronoise can only hit legal targets that share a type with Synchronoise’s user.

Telekinesis.description: For 1d4+1 turns, the target is immune to Ground-type Moves and whenever the target is targeted by a Move, the Move’s user needs -5 to hit. Telekinesis’ effect cannot stack, if a target is already under the effect of Telekinesis, the newest successful instance of Telekinesis replaces the old one.

Teleport.description: Teleport can be used as an Intercept at any time. If used as an Intercept, roll 1d20 and if you don’t roll 7 or higher, Teleport fails to activate. The user can shift 1d10+10 meters. They can move through blocking terrain and hindering terrain as if it is regular terrain. Moves that targeted Teleport’s user continues through the desired target’s space if the Move allows for it. If Teleport fails when used as an Intercept, treat it as if you did not use it for purposes of Frequency.

Trick.description: Both targets must be hit for Trick to succeed. If Trick targets the user, you do not need to roll an Accuracy Check for the user. Both targets lose their Held Item, and gain the other target’s Held Item. If a target has no Held Item, the still can gain the other target’s Held Item.

Trick Room.description: For 1d4+1 rounds, the area is considered Rewinding. While Rewinding, the order in which combatants go during a round of Combat isn’t ordered from highest Speed to lowest Speed; instead it is order from lowest Speed to Highest Speed. Rewinding does not replace other Weather effects.

Wonder Room.description: For 1d4+1 rounds, the area is considered Wondered. While Wondered, each individual Pokpmon’s Defense and Special Defense are switched. Wondered does not replace other Weather effects.

Zen Headbutt.description: Zen Headbutt Flinches the target on 1520 during Accuracy Check. Rock Moves

Accelerock.description: If a foe wants to declare a Move, you may instead use Accelerock on their turn before they can use their Move.

Ancient Power.description: Ancient Power creates a Column that is 2-meters wide. If you rolled 11-20 during Accuracy Check for Ancient Power, the user has each of its stats raised 1 Combat Stage. If you rolled 16-20 on the Accuracy Roll, all allies in the Column also have each of their stats raised 1 Combat Stage and are not damaged by Ancient Power.

Head Smash.description: The target is pushed back 5-meters. The target takes an additional 1d12 if it is Pushed into Blocking Terrain. If the target is pushed into another Legal Target, instead, both take 1d12. After Head Smash deals damage, Recoil.

Rock Blast.description: Rock Blast can hit up to 5 times. Once the user misses, they cannot attempt to make another Rock Blast attack on that turn.

Rock Polish.description: Raise the user’s Speed 2 Combat Stages.

Rock Slide.description: Rock Slide creates a Column 4-meters wide. Rock Slide Flinches all Legal Targets on 17-20 during Accuracy Check.

Rock Tomb.description: Rock Tomb creates a 3-meter Blast. Rock Tomb lowers all Legal Targets Speed 1 Combat Stage.

Rock Wrecker.description: On Miss, Rock Wrecker deals the user’s Attack instead to all possible targets.

Rollout.description: The user must use Rollout until it misses, or fails to be able to shift enough to hit a target for their next 4 turns. On the second turn, Rollout uses 2d10+8 for its Damage Dice Roll. On the third turn, Rollout uses 2d10+12. On the fourth turn, Rollout uses 3d10+16. On the fifth and final turn, Rollout uses 4d10+10.

Sandstorm.description: For 1d4+1 rounds, the area is considered Sandstorming. At the beginning of each round, all non-Ground, Rock, or Steel Type Pokpmon lose 1/16th of their full HP. Rock Type Pokpmon are treated as if their Special Defense is raised 2 Combat Stages while Sandstorming.

Smack Down.description: If the target is Flying-type or is floating because of Magnet Rise, Telekinesis, or Levitate, then the target is no longer immune to Ground-type Moves for 1d4+1 turns.

Stealth Rock.description: Set 5 square meters of Stealth Rock, “Rocks,” where at least 1 Rock is adjacent to the user. All 5 Rocks must be adjacent with at least one other space of Rocks next to each other. If a foe moves within 10 meters of a space occupied by Rocks, move at most one Rock to the offender, then destroy the Rock. When that happens, Stealth Rock causes a foe to lose 1/8th of their full HP. Stealth Rock is considered to be dealing damage. Apply Weakness and Resistance. Do not apply stats. A Pokpmon who has been hit by a Stealth Rock Hazard cannot get hit by another in the same encounter until it is returned to a Poke Ball and then sent back out.

Stone Edge.description: Stone Edge is a Critical Hit on 17-20 during Accuracy Check.

Wide Guard.description: If a foe uses Move that hits multiple targets and Wide Guard’s user is one of the targets you may use Wide Guard as an Interrupt. If a Move would hit the user and one of the user’s allies, the Move only hits Wide Guard’s user. If the user is hit by a Move this way, the user does not take any damage and is not affected by any other effects the Move has. This Effect lasts for one turn. Steel Moves

Anchor Shot.description: On hit, the target may not flee or be switched until it is knocked out, for the remainder of the encounter.

Autotomize.description: For the remainder of the Encounter, the user’s Weight Class is one value lower, to a minimum of 1. Raise the user’s Speed 2 Combat Stages.

Bullet Punch.description: If a foe wants to declare a Move, you may instead use Bullet Punch on their turn before they can use their Move.

Doom Desire.description: Doom Desire does nothing on the turn it is used. At the end of the second turn after Doom Desire’s use, use Doom Desire’s damage and effect. Doom Desire creates a Column 1-meter-wide, which starts from anywhere on the field. Doom Desire is deals damage as if it has no Type.

Flash Cannon.description: Flash Cannon lowers the target’s Special Defense 1 Combat Stage on 17-20 during Accuracy Check.

Gear Grind.description: Gear Grind can hit up to 2 times. If Gear Grind misses its first target, you may still use it a second time.

Gear Up.description: If the target has the Plus or Minus Ability, raise the target’s Attack 1 Combat Stage and raise the target’s Special Attack 1 Combat Stage. Gear Up can be used to Target Self.

Gyro Ball.description: For every 10 Speed the target is above the user, add 1d12 to the Damage Dice Roll. Gyro Ball cannot miss.

Heavy Slam.description: If the user is in the same Weight Class as the target, use 1d10 for Damage Dice Roll; if the user is one Weight Class higher than the target, use 1d10+10; if the user is two Weight Classes higher than the target, use 2d12+12; if three classes, 3d10+14; if four classes, 5d10+16.

Iron Defense.description: Raise the user’s Defense 2 Combat Stages.

Iron Head.description: Iron Head Flinches the target on 15-20 during Accuracy Check.

Iron Tail.description: Iron Tail lowers the target’s Defense 1 Combat Stage on 19-20 during Accuracy Check.

King’s Shield.description: If the user is hit by a Move with a Damage Dice Roll, instead you are not hit by the Move. You do not take any damage nor are you affected by any of the Move’s effects. If the Move was Melee ranged, the attacker’s Attack is lowered 2 Combat Stages.

Metal Burst.description: Metal Burst may only be used if the user didn’t move first in the round and the user has taken damage from a Move this round. The Target is dealt damage equal to 1.5x the amount of damage the user received during the last Move that hit it. Do not apply weakness, resistance or immunity. Do not apply stats.

Metal Claw.description: Raise the user’s Attack 1 Combat Stage on 18-20 during Accuracy Check.

Metal Sound.description: Metal Sound creates a 4-meter Burst. All Legal Targets have their Special Defense lowered 2 Combat Stages.

Meteor Mash.description: Raise the user’s Attack 1 Combat Stage on 15-20 during Accuracy Check.

Mirror Shot.description: Mirror Shot creates a Column 1 meter wide. All Legal Targets must roll +2 during Accuracy Checks to hit on 16-20 during Accuracy Check.

Shift Gear.description: Raise the user’s Attack 1 Combat Stage and raise the user’s Speed 2 Combat Stages.

Steel Wing.description: Raise the user’s Defense 1 Combat Stage on 15-20 during Accuracy Check.

Sunsteel Strike.description: Sunsteel Strike creates a 5-meter Burst. All Legal Targets may not use Abilities or Moves to negate Sunsteel Strike. Water Moves

Aqua Jet.description: If a foe wants to declare a Move, you may instead use Aqua Jet on their turn before they can use their Move.

Aqua Ring.description: Aqua Ring covers the user in a Coat that heals the user at the beginning of each of their turns. The user is healed 1/16th of their full HP each turn.

Brine.description: If the target is below 50% HP, Brine deals 5d12+22 during Damage Dice Roll.

Bubble.description: Bubble lowers the target’s Speed on 1620 during Accuracy Check.

Bubble Beam.description: Bubble Beam creates a Column 1 meter wide. Bubble Beam lowers the target’s Speed on 18-20 during Accuracy Check.

Clamp.description: Clamp Traps the target and the user for 1d4+1 turns. At the beginning of the target’s turn, if the target is Trapped, roll 1d12 and the target loses that much HP. Do not apply weakness or resistance to the HP lost. Do not apply stats to the HP lost. Clamp may not trap more than one target at a time unless the user is Huge or Gigantic.

Crabhammer.description: Crabhammer Pushes the target 2-meters. Crabhammer is a Critical Hit on 18-20 during Accuracy Check.

Dive.description: Once you declare the use of Dive, the user is moved underwater and their turn ends. On the next turn, Dive’s user may shift then use Dive’s damage. While underwater, Dive’s user may not be the target of Moves. There must be a body of water around the battlefield to use Dive.

Hydro Cannon.description: Hydro Cannon creates a 3-meter Blast. On Miss, Hydro Cannon deals the user’s Special Attack instead to all possible targets.

Hydro Pump.description: Hydro Pump creates a Column 1 meter wide.

Liquidation.description: Liquidation lowers the target’s Defense 1 Combat Stage on 17-20 during Accuracy Check.

Muddy Water.description: Muddy Water makes a Column 4meters wide. All Legal Targets must roll +2 during Accuracy Checks to hit on 16 -20 during Accuracy Check.

Octazooka.description: All Legal Targets must roll +1 during Accuracy Checks to hit on 11-20 during Accuracy Check.

Rain Dance.description: For 1d4+1 rounds, the area is considered Rainy. While Rainy, Water-Type attacks deal 1.5x damage. Fire-Type attacks deal ½ the damage they normally would.

Razor Shell.description: Razor Shell lowers the Target’s Defense 1 Combat Stage on 11-20 during Accuracy Check.

Scald.description: Scald Burns the target on 15-20 during Accuracy Check.

Soak.description: For 1d4+1 turns, the target’s Elemental Type(s), become(s) Water Type.

Sparkling Aria.description: Sparkling Aria creates a 4-meter Burst. If a Legal Target is the user’s Ally and is Burned, Sparkling Aria heals the target of its Burn instead of damaging them.

Water Pledge.description: If used on the same turn as Fire Pledge, all secondary effects of Moves are activated at a -3 during the Accuracy Check for 1d4+1 turns. If used on the same turn as Grass Pledge, all foes are treated as if at -2 Speed Combat Stages for 1d4+1 turns, if any foe has additional Speed Combat Stages, apply them as usual.

Water Pulse.description: Water Pulse creates a 3-meter Burst. Water Pulse Confuses all Legal Targets on 17-20 during Accuracy Check.

Water Shuriken.description: If a foe wants to declare a Move, you may instead use Water Shuriken on their turn before they can use their Move.  Water Shuriken can hit up to 5 times. Once the user misses, they cannot attempt to make another Water Shuriken attack on that turn.

Water Sport.description: Water Sport makes a Coat that resists Fire Moves. Water Sport can be used to Target Self.

Water Spout.description: Water Spout creates a 10-meter Burst. Water Spout may not be performed unless the user has at least 90% of its HP.

Waterfall.description: The target is Pushed 2-meters. If the target is airborne, Waterfall deals an additional 1d12 during Damage Dice Roll. Waterfall Flinches the target on 17 -20 during Accuracy Check.

Whirlpool.description: Whirlpool Traps the target for 1d4+1 turns. At the beginning of the target’s turn, if the target is Trapped, roll 1d12 and the target loses that much HP. Do not apply weakness or resistance to the HP lost. Do not apply stats to the HP lost. Whirlpool may not trap more than one target at a time.

Withdraw.description: Raise the user’s Defense 1 Combat Stage.

abilities.Adaptability: Static. When using Moves with a Damage Dice Roll that are the same elemental Type as the Pokémon, add 2 STAB instead of 1.
abilities.Aerilate: Static. The Pokémon's Normal Type Moves are treated as Flying Type Moves. Add 2 STAB when dealing damage.
abilities.Aftermath: Trigger. When reduced to 0 HP or less, creates a 5-meter Burst. Everything in the Burst loses ¼ of their full HP.
abilities.Air Lock: Cast – Hourly, Sustain. The weather is set to normal as long as the Pokémon wants it to remain that way.
abilities.Analytic: Cast - Hourly. For the next 5 rounds, if the user's turn comes immediately after any target, deals +1 STAB on Moves with Damage Dice Rolls.
abilities.Anger Point: Trigger. When the Pokémon receives a Critical Hit, raise their Attack 6 Combat Stages.
abilities.Anticipation: Cast – Hourly. Target reveals if they have Super-Effective moves. Better rolls reveal more moves and make them harder to hit.
abilities.Arena Trap: Cast – Daily. Creates 10-40 meter diameter wall of sand 10-meters high that constantly shifts, preventing escape.
abilities.Aroma Veil: Static, Immune. Immune to Taunt, Torment, Encore, Disable, Heal Block, and Attract. Also protects adjacent allies.
abilities.Aura Break: Trigger. If Dark Aura or Fairy Aura are active, those types deal 2 less STAB instead of bonus STAB.
abilities.Bad Dreams: Static. Anything sleeping within 30-meters loses 1/8th of their full HP at the beginning of each round.
abilities.Battery: Cast – Hourly. Raise all adjacent ally's Special Attack 1 Combat Stage.
abilities.Battle Armor: Static, Immune. Immune to Critical Hits.
abilities.Beast Boost: Trigger. Whenever the user knocks out a Pokémon, raises its highest non-HP stat 1 Combat Stage.
abilities.Berserk: Trigger. When HP is lowered below 50%, Special Attack is raised 2 Combat Stages.
abilities.Big Pecks: Static, Immune. Cannot have Defense Stat or Combat Stages lowered.
abilities.Blaze: Trigger, Last Chance. Fire type moves get additional STAB when HP ≤ 1/3.
abilities.Bulletproof: Static, Immune. Immune to ball/bomb "moves": Acid Spray, Aura Sphere, Barrage, Beak Blast, Bullet Seed, Egg Bomb, Electro Ball, Energy Ball, Focus Blast, Gyro Ball, Ice Ball, Magnet Bomb, Mist Ball, Mud Bomb, Octazooka, Pollen Puff, Rock Wrecker, Searing Shot, Seed Bomb, Shadow Ball, Sludge Bomb, Weather Ball, and Zap Cannon.
abilities.Cheek Pouch: Trigger - Hourly. When eating a Berry, recover 15 HP in addition to the Berry's normal effect.
abilities.Chlorophyll: Trigger - Hourly. While in Sunny Weather, the Speed stat is doubled.
abilities.Clear Body: Static. Combat Stages may not be lowered by Abilities or Moves. Status effects may still alter Combat Stages.
abilities.Cloud Nine: Cast – Hourly. Return Weather to Normal if higher level than the Pokémon who caused the weather effect.
abilities.Color Change: Trigger. When hit by a damage-dealing Move, Type changes to the same Type as the attacking Move.
abilities.Comatose: Static. Always Asleep and cannot get other status afflictions. May act as if not Asleep.
abilities.Competitive: Static. Whenever a Combat Stage is lowered by something other than own Moves/Abilities, Special Attack is raised 2 Combat Stages for each stage lowered.
abilities.Compound Eyes: Static. Needs -3 to hit on any Accuracy Check.
abilities.Contrary: Static. Combat Stage changes are reversed - raises become lowers and vice versa.
abilities.Corrosion: Static. May Poison or Badly Poison Steel or Poison Type targets.
abilities.Cursed Body: Trigger - Hourly. When hit by a melee Move, that Move becomes Disabled after damage is dealt.
abilities.Cute Charm: Trigger - Daily. When attacked by opposite gender, attacker becomes Infatuated after damage is dealt.
abilities.Damp: Static. Prevents Selfdestruct and Explosion within 20-meters. Also prevents Aftermath activation within 20-meters.
abilities.Dancer: Trigger - Hourly. When within 10 meters of any target using a Dance Move, may immediately use the same Move.
abilities.Dark Art: Trigger, Last Chance. Dark type moves get additional STAB when HP ≤ 1/3.
abilities.Dark Aura: Cast – Hourly. For the remainder of the Encounter, Dark Type Moves with Damage Dice Roll deal additional 2 STAB.
abilities.Dazzling: Static. Pokémon cannot use Interrupt Moves while within 20 meters.
abilities.Defeatist: Trigger. When below 50% HP, Attack and Special Attack set at -3 Combat Stages and cannot be changed unless HP recovers above 50%.
abilities.Defiant: Static. Whenever a Combat Stage is lowered by something other than own Moves/Abilities, Attack is raised 2 Combat Stages for each stage lowered.
abilities.Delta Stream: Cast – At-Will, Weather. Eliminates other Weather effects. Prevents other Weather and Flying types don't take Super Effective damage.
abilities.Desolate Land: Cast – At-Will, Weather. Uses Sunny Day as a Free Action.
abilities.Disguise: Static. First time dealt damage by a Move with Damage Dice Roll each encounter, takes no damage and ignores effects.
abilities.Download: Static. When targeting, foe reveals which defense is lower. Attack treated as +1 if target's Defense < Sp.Defense, Sp.Attack +1 if Sp.Defense < Defense.
abilities.Drizzle: Cast – Hourly, Weather. Uses Rain Dance as a Free Action.
abilities.Drought: Cast – Hourly, Weather. Uses Sunny Day as a Free Action.
abilities.Dry Skin: Static. In "sun": loses 1/8 HP per round. In "rain": gains 1/8 HP per round. Fire moves deal extra damage, Water moves heal instead of damage.
abilities.Early Bird: Static. When making Sleep Checks, Sleep Check counter starts at 11.
abilities.Effect Spore: Trigger. When hit by melee Move, roll "d20": 15-16 Poison, 17-18 Paralysis, 19-20 Sleep.
abilities.Electric Surge: Cast – Hourly, Weather. Uses Electric Terrain as a Free Action.
abilities.Emergency Exit: Trigger. When damaged below 50% max HP, immediately begins fleeing with +20 Speed Skills. Loyalty lowers if not returned to Ball within 1 round.
abilities.Fae Force: Trigger, Last Chance. Fairy type moves get additional STAB when HP ≤ 1/3.
abilities.Fairy Aura: Cast - Hourly. For the remainder of the Encounter, Fairy Type Moves with Damage Dice Roll deal additional 2 STAB.
abilities.Filter: Static. Super-Effective attacks deal 1.5x damage instead of 2x. Super-Super-Effective attacks deal 3x instead of 4x.
abilities.Flame Body: Trigger - Daily. When hit by melee Move, attacker becomes Burned after damage is dealt.
abilities.Flare Boost: Static. When Burned, Special Attack raised 2 Combat Stages. If cured, Special Attack lowered 2 Combat Stages.
abilities.Flash Fire: Static. Immune to Fire damage and Freezing. If hit by Fire Move, adds +1/2 STAB to next Fire Move used in encounter.
abilities.Flower Gift: Trigger - Hourly, Burst. If Sunny, creates 4-meter Burst. User and allies in sun get +2 Attack and +2 Sp.Defense.
abilities.Flower Veil: Static, Immune. User and Grass allies immune to stat lowering, Confusion, and Infatuation.
abilities.Fluffy: Static. Takes ½ damage from Attack stat moves, but 2x damage from Fire moves. Applied after weakness/resistance.
abilities.Focus: Trigger, Last Chance. Fighting type moves get additional STAB when HP ≤ 1/3.
abilities.Forecast: Trigger. Type changes with "Weather": Fire (Sunny), Ice (Hail), Water (Rain), Normal (other).
abilities.Forewarn: Cast - Hourly. Reveals target's highest Damage Dice Roll Move. Revealed moves must roll +2 to hit.
abilities.Freezing Point: Trigger, Last Chance. Ice type moves get additional STAB when HP ≤ 1/3.
abilities.Friend Guard: Cast - Daily. For rest of encounter, adjacent allies don't include STAB in damage from multi-die attacks.
abilities.Frisk: Cast - Hourly. Adjacent target reveals what item they are holding.
abilities.Full Metal Body: Static. Combat Stages may not be lowered by Abilities or Moves. Status effects may still alter Combat Stages.
abilities.Fur Coat: Static. Halves damage from Attack stat moves after applying weakness and resistance.
abilities.Gale Wing: Cast - Hourly. May use a Flying Type Move as an Interrupt.
abilities.Galvanize: Static. Normal Type Moves treated as Electric Type. Add 2 STAB when dealing damage.
abilities.Gather: Cast - Weekly. 1d2 Unown appear. Not immediately hostile.
abilities.Gluttony: Trigger. When given consumable item, immediately eats it. Effects are doubled.
abilities.Gooey: Trigger. When hit by Melee Move, attacker's Speed lowered one Combat Stage.
abilities.Grass Pelt: Static. While on grass terrain, Defense Stat raised 2 Combat Stages.
abilities.Grassy Surge: Cast – Hourly, Weather. Uses Grassy Terrain as a Free Action.
abilities.Guts: Trigger - Hourly. When Burned, Poisoned, Paralyzed, Frozen or Asleep, Attack raised 2 Combat Stages. Stages lost when status ends.
abilities.Harvest: Trigger - At-Will. When eating Berry, flip coin. "Heads": produces another same Berry. Always works in Sunny Weather.
abilities.Haunt: Trigger, Last Chance. Ghost type moves get additional STAB when HP ≤ 1/3.
abilities.Healer: Cast - Hourly. One adjacent target with status afflictions is cured of all status afflictions.
abilities.Heat Proof: Static. Halves damage from Fire Type Moves after applying weakness and resistance.
abilities.Heavy Metal: Static. Treated as 2 Weight Classes higher. Cannot be pushed.
abilities.Honey Gather: Cast - Daily. Finds Honey if not holding item. If used in encounter, cannot miss next three Moves against wild foes.
abilities.Huge Power: Static. Base Attack stat doubled. May double Nature/Vitamin bonuses, not Feature bonuses.
abilities.Hustle: Static. Attack raised 1 Combat Stage. Must roll +2 during Accuracy Checks for Attack stat moves.
abilities.Hydration: Trigger. In Rainy Weather, healed of Paralysis, Burns, Poison, Freezing, or Sleep.
abilities.Hyper Cutter: Static. Attack Combat Stages may not be lowered.
abilities.Ice Body: Trigger. In Hailing Weather, gains 1/16 full HP at beginning of each turn.
abilities.Illuminate: Static. Moves targeting user must roll +2 to hit during Accuracy Check.
abilities.Illusion: Trigger - At-Will. When sent out, may look like another Pokémon from your team until taking damage from a Move.
abilities.Imposter: Cast - Daily. Ditto uses Transform as free action when sent out. Copies Combat Stages and gains random Ability.
abilities.Infiltrator: Static. Ignores Coats, Walls and Hazards.
abilities.Innards Out: Trigger. When knocked out by Melee Move, deals damage to attacker equal to HP before knockout.
abilities.Intimidate: Cast - Hourly. Lower one target's Attack 1 Combat Stage.
abilities.Iron Barbs: Trigger. When hit by Melee Move, attacker loses 1/8 full HP.
abilities.Iron Fist: Static. Punching moves (Bullet Punch, Comet Punch, Dizzy Punch, Drain Punch, Dynamic Punch, Fire Punch, Focus Punch, Hammer Arm, Ice Punch, Mach Punch, Mega Punch, Meteor Mash, Power-Up Punch, Shadow Punch, Sucker Punch, Sky Uppercut, Thunder Punch) deal additional 2 STAB.
abilities.Justified: Trigger - At-Will. When hit by damaging Dark Move, may raise Attack 1 Combat Stage.
abilities.Keen Eye: Static. Accuracy Checks cannot be negatively affected except by Defense, Sp.Defense or Speed stats.
abilities.Klutz: Static. May drop held items as Free Action even with status. May hold item and ignore its effects.
abilities.Landslide: Trigger, Last Chance. Ground type moves get additional STAB when HP ≤ 1/3.
abilities.Last Chance: Trigger, Last Chance. Normal type moves get additional STAB when HP ≤ 1/3.
abilities.Leaf Guard: Trigger. In Sunny Weather, healed of Paralysis, Burns, Poison, Freezing, or Sleep.
abilities.Levitate: Static. Immune to Ground Type Moves.
abilities.Light Metal: Static. Treated as 2 Weight Classes lower. Speed Skills +3, Jump Skill +1.
abilities.Lightning Rod: Static. Electric moves within 25-meters drawn to this Pokémon. Immune to Electric damage/effects. Each Electric hit raises Sp.Attack 1 stage.
abilities.Liquid Ooze: Trigger. When damaged by draining moves (Absorb, Drain Punch, Giga Drain, Horn Leech, Leech Life, Leech Seed, Mega Drain), attacker loses life instead of gaining.
abilities.Liquid Voice: Static. Sound keyword moves become Water Type.
abilities.Long Reach: Static. Never makes contact with targets. Melee moves become Ranged (10).
abilities.Mach Speed: Trigger, Last Chance. Flying type moves get additional STAB when HP ≤ 1/3.
abilities.Magician: Trigger. When hitting opponent with held item using Ranged Move, takes that item if not holding any.
abilities.Magic Bounce: Trigger - Hourly. When hit by Melee/Ranged No Damage Move, may reflect back to offender. Can redirect Hazards within 10 meters.
abilities.Magic Guard: Static. Does not lose HP from non-Damage Dice Roll sources (Weather, Leech Seed, Afflictions, Traps, Recoil, etc.).
abilities.Magnet Pull: Cast - Hourly. Target Steel Type cannot move more/less than 20-meters from user.
abilities.Marvel Scale: Static. When Asleep, Paralyzed, Burned, Frozen or Poisoned, both Defense and Sp.Defense raised 2 Combat Stages.
abilities.Mega Launcher: Static. Pulse moves (Aura Sphere, Dark Pulse, Dragon Pulse, Heal Pulse, Origin Pulse, Water Pulse) deal additional 2 STAB.
abilities.Merciless: Static. Moves against Poisoned targets are always Critical Hits.
abilities.Mind Mold: Trigger, Last Chance. Psychic type moves get additional STAB when HP ≤ 1/3.
abilities.Minus: Static. When ally with Plus is within 10 meters, treated as if Sp.Attack raised 2 Combat Stages.
abilities.Misty Surge: Cast - Hourly, Weather. Uses Misty Terrain as a Free Action.
abilities.Mold Breaker: Cast - Hourly. Target's Ability disabled until end of encounter.
abilities.Moody: Cast - Required first turn. Random stat changes every 1d4+1 rounds. +2 to one stat, -1 to another.
abilities.Motor Drive: Static. Immune to Electric damage/effects. Each Electric hit raises Speed 1 Combat Stage.
abilities.Mountain Peak: Trigger, Last Chance. Rock type moves get additional STAB when HP ≤ 1/3.
abilities.Moxie: Trigger. When Move causes target to faint, may raise Attack 1 Combat Stage.
abilities.Multiscale: Static. When at full HP, halves damage before weakness/resistance/defense.
abilities.Multitype: Cast - At Will. Arceus changes Type to any Elemental Type. Cannot be copied or disabled.
abilities.Mummy: Static. When targeted by Melee Move, offender gets Mummy for 1d6+2 rounds.
abilities.Natural Cure: Cast - Hourly. Cured of status when returned to Poké Ball.
abilities.Neuroforce: Static. When hitting for Super Effective damage, rolls +3d20 for damage.
abilities.No Guard: Cast - At Will. Until end of encounter, all user's moves cannot miss and all moves targeting user cannot miss.
abilities.Normalize: Cast - At Will. Until end of encounter, all user's moves become Normal Type.
abilities.Oblivious: Static, Immune. Cannot be Infatuated. Immune to Taunt.
abilities.Overcharge: Trigger, Last Chance. Electric type moves get additional STAB when HP ≤ 1/3.
abilities.Overcoat: Static. No damage from harmful Weather. Immune to powder moves (Cotton Spore, Poison Powder, Powder, Rage Powder, Sleep Powder, Spore, Stun Spore).
abilities.Overgrow: Trigger, Last Chance. Grass type moves get additional STAB when HP ≤ 1/3.
abilities.Parental Bond: Static. When using Damage Dice Roll Move without Scatter, may immediately use same Move again. Second attack has no Damage Dice Roll.
abilities.Pickpocket: Trigger - Daily. When hitting opponent with held item using Melee Move, takes that item if not holding any.
abilities.Pickup: Cast - Daily, Pickup. Roll 1d20 at end of encounter to find random item.
abilities.Pixilate: Static. Normal Type Moves treated as Fairy Type. Add 2 STAB when dealing damage.
abilities.Plus: Static. When ally with Minus is within 10 meters, treated as if Sp.Attack raised 2 Combat Stages.
abilities.Poison Heal: Static. When Poisoned or Badly Poisoned, gains 1/8 full HP per turn instead of losing HP. No Combat Stage penalties.
abilities.Poison Point: Trigger - Daily. When hit by melee Move, attacker becomes Poisoned.
abilities.Poison Touch: Static. Attack stat Damage Dice Roll moves Poison targets on 15-20. Replaces existing poison chances.
abilities.Power Construct: Trigger. When Zygarde in danger, becomes Complete Form, recovering to full HP and increasing Base Stats.
abilities.Power of Alchemy: Trigger. When ally knocked out, may change Ability to ally's Ability until end of encounter.
abilities.Prankster: Cast - Daily. For remainder of encounter, No Damage moves gain Interrupt keyword. Cannot use with moves that set HP to 0.
abilities.Pressure: Cast - Daily. All enemies have moves set to original frequency. At-Will moves become EOT.
abilities.Primordial Sea: Cast – At-Will, Weather. Uses Rain Dance as a Free Action.
abilities.Prism Armor: Static. Necrozma takes super-effective damage as if not super-effective.
abilities.Protean: Cast - Hourly. For remainder of encounter, Type changes to match Move type before damage.
abilities.Psychic Surge: Cast - Hourly, Weather. Uses Psychic Terrain as a Free Action.
abilities.Pure Blooded: Trigger, Last Chance. Dragon type moves get additional STAB when HP ≤ 1/3.
abilities.Pure Power: Static. Base Attack Stat doubled. May double Nature/Vitamin bonuses, not Feature bonuses.
abilities.Queenly Majesty: Static. Pokémon cannot use Interrupt Moves while within 20 meters.
abilities.Quick Feet: Static. When Poisoned, Burned, Frozen or Asleep, Speed +2 Combat Stages. When Paralyzed, Speed +4 Combat Stages.
abilities.Rain Dish: Trigger. In Rainy Weather, gains 1/16 full HP at beginning of each turn.
abilities.Rattled: Trigger. When hit by Bug, Dark, or Ghost Move, may raise Speed 1 Combat Stage.
abilities.Receiver: Trigger. When ally knocked out, may change Ability to ally's Ability until end of encounter.
abilities.Reckless: Static. Recoil moves (Brave Bird, Double-Edge, Flare Blitz, Head Charge, Head Smash, High Jump Kick, Jump Kick, Light of Ruin, Submission, Take Down, Volt Tackle, Wood Hammer, Wild Charge) deal additional 2 STAB.
abilities.Refrigerate: Static. Normal Type Moves treated as Ice Type. Add 1 STAB when dealing damage.
abilities.Regenerator: Cast - Hourly. Instantly heals 1/4 max HP.
abilities.Rivalry: Static. When battling same gender, may raise Attack 2 Combat Stages. Once per encounter.
abilities.RKS System: Cast – At-Will. May change Type from Normal to Type matching held memory disc as free action.
abilities.Rock Head: Static. No HP loss from recoil moves (Brave Bird, Double-Edge, Flare Blitz, Head Charge, Head Smash, Light of Ruin, Submission, Take Down, Volt Tackle, Wood Hammer, Wild Charge).
abilities.Rough Skin: Static. When hit by Melee Move, attacker loses 1/8 full HP.
abilities.Run Away: Static. Cannot be Trapped. Speed Combat Stages cannot go below 0. Speed Skills +2.
abilities.Sand Force: Trigger - Daily. In Sandstorm, immune to sand damage and Rock/Steel/Ground moves deal +1 STAB.
abilities.Sand Rush: Trigger - Daily. In Sandstorm, immune to sand damage and Speed raised 4 Combat Stages.
abilities.Sand Stream: Cast - Daily, Weather. Uses Sandstorm as a Free Action.
abilities.Sand Veil: Cast - Hourly, Sustain. In Sandstorm, creates Clear Weather bubbles within 15-meters. Moves into bubbles need +2 to hit.
abilities.Sap Sipper: Static. Immune to Grass damage. When hit by Grass Move, may raise Attack 1 Combat Stage (once per turn).
abilities.Schooling: Static. Wishiwashi (Level 20+) near large water becomes Schooling form. Returns to single form at <50% HP.
abilities.Scrappy: Static. Moves can always hit Ghost types. No immunities applied, treat as neutral damage.
abilities.Serene Grace: Static. Move effects that activate during Accuracy Check have requirements reduced by 3. Does not apply to Critical Hits.
abilities.Shadow Shield: Trigger. At full HP, reduces damage from first Damage Dice Roll move by ½.
abilities.Shadow Tag: Cast - Daily. Once adjacent to target, they are Trapped within 20-meters.
abilities.Shed Skin: Cast - Hourly. Cured of Paralysis, Freezing, Burns, Poison, and Sleep.
abilities.Sheer Force: Cast - Daily. For rest of encounter, secondary effects ignored but those attacks deal additional 2 STAB.
abilities.Shell Armor: Static, Immune. Cannot be Critically Hit.
abilities.Shield Dust: Static. Effects of damage dealing Moves are disabled.
abilities.Shields Down: Static. When Minior's HP ≤ 50%, changes to Core form.
abilities.Simple: Static. When Combat Stages altered, double the amount raised or lowered.
abilities.Skill Link: Static. Scatter keyword moves can be used for maximum attempts even if first attempts miss.
abilities.Slow Start: Static. For 3 rounds, Speed and Attack Stats are halved.
abilities.Slush Rush: Trigger - Daily. In Hail, immune to hail damage and Speed raised 4 Combat Stages.
abilities.Sniper: Static. When getting Critical Hit, add additional Damage Dice Roll.
abilities.Snow Cloak: Cast - Hourly, Sustain. In Hail, creates Clear Weather bubbles within 15-meters. Moves into bubbles need +2 to hit.
abilities.Snow Warning: Cast - Hourly, Weather. Uses Hail as a Free Action.
abilities.Solar Power: Trigger. In Sunny Weather, loses 1/8 HP per turn but Sp.Attack increased 2 Combat Stages.
abilities.Solid Rock: Static. Super Effective moves are only regularly effective. Super-Super Effective moves are only Super Effective.
abilities.Soul-Heart: Trigger. When anything within 50 meters is knocked out, Sp.Attack raised 1 Combat Stage.
abilities.Soundproof: Static, Immune. Immune to sound moves (Boomburst, Bug Buzz, Chatter, Clanging Scales, Confide, Disarming Voice, Echoed Voice, Grass Whistle, Growl, Heal Bell, Hyper Voice, Metal Sound, Noble Roar, Parting Shot, Perish Song, Relic Song, Roar, Roar of Time, Round, Screech, Sing, Snarl, Snore, Sparkling Aria, Supersonic, Uproar).
abilities.Speed Boost: Cast - Hourly. For remainder of encounter, Speed raised 1 Combat Stage each turn.
abilities.Stakeout: Trigger - Daily. When using Move against target just sent out, double damage after Weakness/Resistance if Move has Damage Dice Roll.
abilities.Stall: Static. Always last in round queue, even if other Pokémon go to end.
abilities.Stamina: Trigger. When hit with Damage Dice Roll Move, Defense raised 1 Combat Stage after damage.
abilities.Stance Change: Static. When Aegislash uses Damage Dice Roll Move, switches Defense/Sp.Defense with Attack/Sp.Attack. Returns to normal with Intercept Move.
abilities.Static: Trigger - Daily. When hit by melee Move, attacker becomes Paralyzed.
abilities.Steadfast: Trigger. When Flinched, Speed raised 1 Combat Stage.
abilities.Steelworker: Static. Steel Type Moves deal additional 2 STAB.
abilities.Stench: Static. Damage moves Flinch targets on 19-20. If move already Flinches, reduces requirement by 2.
abilities.Sticky Hold: Static. Held items cannot be stolen, switched, destroyed or dropped.
abilities.Storm Drain: Static. Water moves within 25-meters drawn to this Pokémon. Immune to Water damage/effects. Each Water hit raises Sp.Attack 1 stage.
abilities.Strong Jaw: Static. Biting moves (Bite, Bug Bite, Crunch, Fire Fang, Hyper Fang, Ice Fang, Poison Fang, Psychic Fangs, Thunder Fang) deal additional 1 STAB.
abilities.Sturdy: Static. Immune to OHKO moves (Sheer Cold, Guillotine, Horn Drill, Fissure). If at full HP and would be reduced to ≤0 HP, HP set to 1 instead.

abilities.Super Luck: Static. Critical Hits on 18-20. If move already has extended crit range, extends by 2 more.
abilities.Surge Surfer: Trigger - Daily. In Electric Terrain, Speed raised 4 Combat Stages.
abilities.Swarm: Trigger, Last Chance. Bug type moves get additional STAB when HP ≤ 1/3.
abilities.Sweet Veil: Static, Immune. User and adjacent allies immune to Sleep.
abilities.Swift Swim: Trigger - Hourly. In Rainy Weather, Speed raised 4 Combat Stages.
abilities.Symbiosis: Cast - At-Will. Gives held item to adjacent target without held item.
abilities.Synchronize: Trigger - Hourly. When given status by foe (Paralysis, Freeze, Burn, Poison, Sleep), foe gets same status.
abilities.Tangled Feet: Trigger. While Confused, foes must roll +3 during Accuracy Check to hit.
abilities.Tangling Hair: Trigger. When hit by Melee Move, attacker's Speed lowered 1 Combat Stage.
abilities.Technician: Static. Moves with max damage <30 add 2d10 to Damage Dice Roll. Only applies once with Scatter.
abilities.Telepathy: Static. When targeted by move, if offender doesn't want this Pokémon as Legal Target, it isn't.
abilities.Teravolt: Cast - Hourly. Target's Abilities disabled until end of encounter.
abilities.Thick Fat: Static. Treated as Resistant to Fire and Ice Type Moves.
abilities.Tinted Lens: Static. Resisted moves deal neutral damage. Doubly resisted moves are only resisted.
abilities.Torrent: Trigger, Last Chance. Water type moves get additional STAB when HP ≤ 1/3.
abilities.Tough Claws: Static. Deals additional 15 damage when using Melee moves.
abilities.Toxic Boost: Static. When Poisoned or Badly Poisoned, Attack raised 2 Combat Stages. If cured, Attack lowered 2 Combat Stages.
abilities.Trace: Cast - Hourly, Sustain. Gains Ability of target within 10-meters. Must remain out of Ball and above 0 HP to sustain.
abilities.Triage: Static. Moves that cure afflictions or heal HP have Interrupt.
abilities.Truant: Static. Roll d20 when trying to "act": 1-8 does nothing, 9-20 acts normally.
abilities.Turboblaze: Cast - Hourly. Target's Abilities disabled until end of encounter.
abilities.Unaware: Static. When attacking or being attacked, ignores all Combat Stages on relevant target or attacker.
abilities.Unbreakable: Trigger, Last Chance. Steel type moves get additional STAB when HP ≤ 1/3.
abilities.Unburden: Trigger. After consuming held item, Speed raised 2 Combat Stages.
abilities.Unnerve: Static. During battle, foes with line of sight cannot eat or drink anything (berries, vitamins, etc.).
abilities.Venom: Trigger, Last Chance. Poison type moves get additional STAB when HP ≤ 1/3.
abilities.Victory Star: Static. All allied Pokémon in encounter need -2 to hit during Accuracy Checks.
abilities.Volt Absorb: Trigger. When hit by Electric Move, heals half the damage that would have been dealt instead of taking damage.
abilities.Water Absorb: Trigger. When hit by Water Move, heals half the damage that would have been dealt instead of taking damage.
abilities.Water Bubble: Static, Immune. Treated as Resistant to Fire Moves and immune to being Burned.
abilities.Water Compaction: Trigger - Hourly. When hit by Water Move with Damage Dice Roll, Defense raised 3 Combat Stages.
abilities.Weak Armor: Trigger. When hit by Attack stat move, may lower Defense 1 stage to raise Speed 1 stage.
abilities.White Smoke: Static. Combat Stages may not be lowered.
abilities.Wimp Out: Trigger. When damaged below 50% max HP, immediately begins fleeing with +20 Speed Skills. Loyalty lowers if not returned to Ball within 1 round.
abilities.Wonder Guard: Static. Only Super-Effective moves hit. All others deal 0 damage. Doesn't work without weaknesses. Only Shedinja and Arceus may have this.
abilities.Wonder Skin: Static. When hit by No Damage move causing status, flip coin. "Heads": ignore affliction. "Tails": hit as usual.
abilities.Zen Mode: Cast - At-Will. Darmanitan keeps two sets of Base Stats. May activate Zen Mode if <50% HP. May switch once per encounter as free action.
